User.title: User
User.description: Base entity representing all system accounts (Employees, Admins, SuperAdmins)

userID.description: Unique identifier of the user (synchronized with Firebase Auth UID)

passwordHash.description: SHA-256 hashed password used for secondary portal matching

status.description: Controls whether the user is permitted to interact with the system

employeeID.description: Specific badge or system ID for employees (empty for non-employees)

adminID.description: Specific admin structural identifier (empty for non-admins)

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when user account was created

Attendance.title: Attendance
Attendance.description: Individual record detailing an employee's check-in or check-out state

employeeName.description: Stored check-in employee name for performant indexing

checkOutTime.description: Exact moment check-out was registered, or null if still checked in

status.description: Current status of the daily shift

QRToken.title: QRToken
QRToken.description: A time-sensitive, single-use security token generated every 1 minute to prevent replay attacks

tokenID.description: Unique identifier for this specific 60s lifecycle code block

tokenValue.description: Numerical code (6 characters) entered manually by the employee

qrCodeValue.description: Cryptographic payload embedded inside the dynamic QR code

expiryTime.description: Exact moment when this specific credential is automatically expired

/users/{userId}.description: Collection containing details and credentials of all users

/attendances/{attendanceId}.description: Collection tracking historical work shift transitions and durations

/qrtokens/{tokenId}.description: Short-lived active credentials created dynamically and validated server-side
